    Improved Version <= !--qkimaf F1DDgb_q/HugV6-->

ml>

span class=3D"undefined" data-processed=3D"true">>
        body {
            background-color: #000000;

;

            max-width: 600px;

20px;

            letter-spacing: -1px;

            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: #8=
88;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            color: #5=
55;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            margin-top: 30px;
        }

        p {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            max-width: 80%;

0px auto;
        }

        .contact-link {
            display: inline-block;
            margin-top: 20px;
            padding: =
12px 24px;
            border: 1=
px solid white;
            color: white;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .contact-link:hover {
            background: white;
            color: black;
        }
    </style=
>
</head>
<body>

    <div class=3D"container">

>Kolden Commerce Group=
</h1>

ands to scale growth and maintain integrity across Amazon and global online=
 marketplaces.</p<=

    Copiado en el portapapeles
    =
    Key Changes Made: 
    1. Flexbox Layout: The content is now perfectly centered vertically and = horizontally on any screen size.
    2. Typography: Used "= Helvetica Neue" for a more premium, corporate feel.<= !--TgQPHd|[]-->
    3. Visual Hierarchy: Added a subtitle and used gray tones for the "About" and= "Contact" headers to make the company name pop.
    4. Interactive Button: Changed the email from plain text to a styled "Contact"= button that turns white when you hover over it.
    5. SEO Title: to be sligh= tly more descriptive for search engines. 
    Next Steps for this Site: <= /span>
    • Favicon: You should add a small logo icon for= the browser tab.
    • Domain: Ensure this is hosted on= a professional domain (which it looks like you have: koldencommerce.co= m).
    • SSL: Make sure your host= ing provider has an active SSL certificate (HTTPS) so visitors don't get a = security warning.

    M=C3=A1s preguntas
    = What d= oes this HTML statement mean <!DOCTYPE HTML?
    HTML`<! DOCTYPE= >` is a declaration that informs the web browser about the HTML (hype= rtext markup language) version used in the document. It ensures correct= rendering by telling the browser which standards to follow.<= /div>

    Correct Browser Rendering with HTML `<!DOCTYPE>` | Lenov= o US


    =
    Lenovo
    https://www.lenovo.com =E2=80=BA glossary =E2=80=BA html= -doctype
    Lenovo
    https://www.lenovo.com =E2=80=BA glossary =E2=80=BA html-doctype
    What is the root element of= an HTML document body head HTML <! doctype HTML?
    The <ht= ml> element is the root element and it defines the whole HTML docume= nt. It has a start tag <html> and an end tag </html> . The <= body> element defines the document's body.

    Which doctype is correct fo= r HTML5 <! doctype HTML5 <! doctype HTML <! doctype?=
    <= ! DOCTYPE html> is the correct way to declare the document ty= pe in HTML5. It is a declaration that must appear at the very top of an HTM= L document, before the <html> tag. It tells the web browser that the = document is written in HTML5, ensuring proper rendering.12 jun 2025

.ag-ltr .ag-body, .ag-ltr .ag-floating-top, .ag-ltr .ag-floating-bottom, .a= g-ltr .ag-header, .ag-ltr .ag-body-viewport, .ag-ltr .ag-body-horizontal-sc= roll { -webkit-box-orient: horizontal; .ag-body-viewport, .ag-rtl .ag-body-horizontal-sc= roll { -webkit-box-orient: horizontal; -webkit-box-direction: reverse; flex= -direction: row-reverse; } .ag-rtl .ag-icon-contracted, .ag-rtl .ag-icon-tree-closed { display: block;= transform: rotate(180deg); } .ag-layout-print.ag-body-viewport { -webkit-box-flex: 0; flex: 0 0 auto; } .ag-layout-print.ag-root-wrapper { display: inline-flex; } .ag-layout-print .ag-center-cols-clipper { min-width: 100%; } .ag-layout-print .ag-body-horizontal-scroll { display: none; } .ag-layout-print.ag-force-vertical-scroll { overflow-y: visible !important;= } @media print { .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-ro= ot-wrapper-body, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-root, .ag-root-wrappe= r.ag-layout-print .ag-body-viewport, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-c= enter-cols-container, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-center-cols-view= port, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-center-cols-clipper, .ag-root-wr= apper.ag-layout-print .ag-body-horizontal-scroll-viewport, .ag-root-wrapper= .ag-layout-print .ag-virtual-list-viewport { height: auto !important; overf= low: hidden !important; display: block !important; } .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-row { break-inside: avoid; } } .ag-body .ag-body-viewport { } .ag-chart { position: relative; display: flex; overflow: hidden; width: 100= %; height: 100%; } .ag-chart-components-wrapper { position: relative; display: flex; -webkit-b= ox-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 auto; overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-title-edit { position: absolute; display: none; top: 0px; left: 0= px; text-align: center; } .ag-chart-title-edit.currently-editing { display: inline-block; } .ag-chart-canvas-wrapper { position: relative; -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1= 1 auto; overflow: hidden; } .ag-charts-canvas { display: block; } .ag-chart-menu { position: absolute; top: 10px; width: 24px; overflow: hidd= en; display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: nor= mal; flex-direction: column; } .ag-ltr .ag-chart-menu { right: 20px; } .ag-rtl .ag-chart-menu { left: 20px; } .ag-chart-docked-container { position: relative; width: 0px; min-width: 0px= ; transition: min-width 0.4s; } .ag-chart-menu-hidden ~ .ag-chart-docked-container { max-width: 0px; overfl= ow: hidden; } .ag-chart-tabbed-menu { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; -webkit-b= ox-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column;= overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-tabbed-menu-header { -webkit-box-flex: 0; flex: 0 0 auto; user-se= lect: none; cursor: default; } .ag-chart-tabbed-menu-body { display: flex; -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 = auto; -webkit-box-align: stretch; align-items: stretch; overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-tab { width: 100%; overflow: hidden auto; } .ag-chart-settings { overflow-x: hidden; } .ag-chart-settings-wrapper { position: relative; -webkit-box-orient: vertic= al; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; hei= ght: 100%; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-settings-nav-bar { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; alig= n-items: center; width: 100%; height: 30px; padding: 0px 10px; user-select:= none; } .ag-chart-settings-card-selector { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center= ; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; -webkit-box-flex: 1; = flex: 1 1 auto; height: 100%; padding: 0px 10px; } .ag-chart-settings-card-item { cursor: pointer; width: 10px; height: 10px; = background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); position: relative; } .ag-chart-settings-card-item.ag-not-selected { opacity: 0.2; } .ag-chart-settings-card-item::before { content: " "; display: block; positi= on: absolute; background-color: transparent; left: 50%; top: 50%; margin-le= ft: -10px; margin-top: -10px; width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ag-chart-settings-prev, .ag-chart-settings-next { position: relative; -web= kit-box-flex: 0; flex: 0 0 auto; } .ag-chart-settings-prev-button, .ag-chart-settings-next-button { position: = absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; cursor: pointer; = opacity: 0; } .ag-chart-settings-mini-charts-container { position: relative; -webkit-box-= flex: 1; flex: 1 1 auto; overflow: hidden auto; } .ag-chart-settings-mini-wrapper { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; = display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal;= flex-direction: column; width: 100%; min-height: 100%; overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-settings-mini-wrapper.ag-animating { transition: left 0.3s ease-i= n-out; } .ag-chart-mini-thumbnail { cursor: pointer; } .ag-chart-mini-thumbnail-canvas { display: block; } .ag-chart-data-wrapper, .ag-chart-format-wrapper { display: flex; -webkit-b= ox-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column;= position: relative; user-select: none; } { display: flex; top: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; = -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; j= ustify-content: center; } .ag-chart .ag-chart-menu { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .ag-chart-menu-hidden:hover .ag-chart-menu { opacity: 1; pointer-events: al= l; } .ag-date-time-list-page-title-bar { display: flex; } 8px 10px; display: flex; -webkit-box-= orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; } .az-stockchecker-condition .new-condition { color: black; margin-left: 5px;= } .az-stockchecker-condition .used-condition { color: black; margin-left: 5px= ; } .az-stockchecker-condition .collectible-condition { color: black; margin-le= ft: 5px; } .stockchecker-lock p { margin: 8px 0px; } .stockchecker-lock span { color: red; cursor: pointer; } .stockchecker-lock { padding: 10px 8px; } .stockchecker-status { padding: 10px 8px; } .stockchecker-note-footer .cls { width: 30px; height: 20px; display: inline= -block; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 4px; } .stockchecker-note-footer > span:nth-child(1), .stockchecker-note-footer > = span:nth-child(2) { width: 37%; display: inline-block; } .stockchecker-note-footer span span { vertical-align: middle; } .stockchecker-note-footer { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: horizontal; = -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: row; padding: 5px 10px; marg= in: 7px 0px; } .az-stochcker-header #stockchecker-tooltip-icon-move, .az-stochcker-header = #stockchecker-tooltip-icon-close, .az-app-header #app-tooltip-icon-move { m= argin-left: 10px; cursor: pointer; margin-right: 10px; white-space: nowrap = !important; } .az-stochcker-header, .az-app-header { padding: 5px; -webkit-box-pack: end;= justify-content: flex-end; display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align= -items: center; height: 32px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); border= -bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.125); } .az-stockchcker-grid .ag-header { height: 62px !important; min-height: 62px= !important; } .az-stockchcker-grid .ag-header-cell { padding-left: 9px; padding-right: 9p= x; height: 30px; } .az-stockchcker-grid .ag-header-cell .ag-floating-filter-button { display: = none !important; } .az-stockchecker-power-filter { padding: 10px; } .az-stockchecker-power-filter .MuiSelect-root { height: 21px; padding: 1px = 25px 0px 5px; width: 120px; text-align: left; } .az-stockchecker-controls span { cursor: pointer; } .az-stockchecker-controls span:hover { color: rgb(228, 121, 17); } .az-stockchcker-grid.ag-theme-alpine .ag-floating-filter-input .ag-input-fi= eld-input { height: 19px; } .az-stockchcker-grid.ag-theme-alpine .ag-cell { padding-left: 9px; padding-= right: 9px; line-height: 30px !important; } .az-stockchecker-container { padding: 5px; } .InputNumberGroup .control { opacity: 0.6; position: absolute; right: 1px; = -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction= : column; top: 2px; bottom: 5px; z-index: 4; justify-content: space-around;= -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; display: none; } .InputNumberGroup .input-group-text { padding-left: 2px !important; padding= -right: 2px !important; font-size: 11px !important; } .InputNumberGroup .clear { opacity: 0.6; position: absolute; top: 0px; bott= om: 0px; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; -webkit-box-ali= gn: center; align-items: center; z-index: 5; display: none; left: 5px; } .InputNumberGroup .clear .svg-inline--fa { font-size: 0.75rem; cursor: poin= ter; } .InputNumberGroup:hover .clear, .InputNumberGroup:hover .control { display:= flex !important; } .InputNumberGroup.input-group-lg .control { width: 1rem; padding: 0px 5px; = border-radius: 10px; } .InputNumberGroup.input-group-lg .control .svg-inline--fa { font-size: 1rem= ; cursor: pointer; margin: 0px; } .InputNumberGroup.input-group-md .control { width: 0.8rem; padding: 0px 5px= ; border-radius: 8px; } .InputNumberGroup.input-group-md .control .svg-inline--fa { font-size: 0.81= 25rem; cursor: pointer; margin: 0px; } .InputNumberGroup.input-group-sm .control { width: 0.5rem; padding: 0px 5px= ; border-radius: 5px; } .InputNumberGroup.input-group-sm .control .svg-inline--fa { font-size: 0.81= 25rem; cursor: pointer; margin: 0px; } .InputNumberGroup.input-group-sm .form-control { font-size: 0.78125rem; col= or: rgb(17, 17, 17); padding-right: 12px !important; } .InputNumberGroup.prepend:not(.inline) .clear { right: -10px; left: auto; } .InputNumberGroup.append input { border-radius: 0.2rem 0px 0px 0.2rem !impo= rtant; } .InputNumberGroup.append .input-group-text { border-radius: 0px 0.2rem 0.2r= em 0px !important; } .InputNumberGroup.append .input-group-append { position: relative; } .InputNumberGroup.append .input-group-append .control { left: -20px; } .InputNumberGroup.input-group { margin: 0px !important; } .InputNumberGroup input { text-align: right; padding: 3px 12px 3px 7px !imp= ortant; } .InputNumberGroup input.form-control-md { padding-right: 20px !important; } .InputNumberGroup.inline { display: inline-block; position: relative; } .InputNumberGroup.inline .control { border: none; } .InputNumberGroup.inline .inline-icon { position: relative; } .InputNumberGroup.inline.append input { padding-right: 20px !important; } .InputNumberGroup.inline.append .control { right: auto; left: -15px; } .InputNumberGroup.inline.append .clear { right: auto; left: 0px; } .InputNumberGroup.inline.prepend input { padding-left: 20px !important; } .InputNumberGroup.inline.prepend .control { left: auto; right: 0px; top: 0p= x; } .InputNumberGroup.inline.prepend .clear { left: auto; right: -10px; } .InputNumberGroup.inline.prepend .no-clear .inline-icon { display: none; } .InputNumberGroup.inline.prepend .no-clear input { padding-left: 4px !impor= tant; padding-right: 4px !important; } .InputNumberGroup.disabled > input { color: grey !important; } .InputNumberGroup.disabled .clear, .InputNumberGroup.disabled .control { di= splay: none !important; } .InputNumberGroup.disabled:hover .clear, .InputNumberGroup.disabled:hover .= control { display: none !important; } .InputNumberGroup .input-group-prepend { position: relative; } .forecast-button { font-size: 0.8125rem; padding: 0px 5px; margin: 0px 1px;= } .forecast-button:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(52, 58,= 64); } .AZ-switch { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 20px; height= : 12px; min-width: 20px; } .AZ-switch input { opacity: 0; width: 0px; height: 0px; } .AZ-switch .slider { position: absolute; cursor: pointer; inset: 0px; backg= round-color: rgb(204, 204, 204); transition: 0.4s; height: unset; transform= : unset; margin-right: unset !important; } .AZ-switch .slider::before { position: absolute; content: ""; height: 8px; = width: 8px; left: 2px; bottom: 2px; transition: 0.4s; background-color: whi= te !important; background-image: unset !important; color: unset !important;= border: unset !important; } .AZ-switch input:checked + .slider { background-color: rgb(245, 166, 35); } .AZ-switch input:focus + .slider { box-shadow: rgb(245, 166, 35) 0px 0px 1p= x; } .AZ-switch input:checked + .slider::before { transform: translateX(8px); } .AZ-switch .slider.round { border-radius: 8px; } .AZ-switch .slider.round::before { border-radius: 50%; } .ZenGraph { position: absolute; inset: 0px; display: flex; -webkit-box-orie= nt: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; } .ZenGraph .canvasjs-chart-toolbar { display: none !important; } .ZenGraph .ZenGraph-Content { -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; position: = relative; } .ZenGraph .ZenGraph-Content .ZenGraph-Content-Tab { width: 100%; height: 10= 0%; position: absolute; z-index: 2; } .ZenGraph .ZenGraph-Content .ZenGraph-Content-Tab.hidden { display: none; } .ZenGraph .MuiTabs-root .MuiTabs-indicator { background-color: rgb(245, 166= , 35); } .ZenGraph .MuiButton-root { line-height: 1; } .ZenGraph .filter { display: flex; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-conten= t: center; -webkit-box-orient: horizontal; -webkit-box-direction: normal; f= lex-direction: row; position: absolute; bottom: 5px; width: 100%; } .ZenGraph .filter a { margin: 5px; } ag-grid, ag-grid-angular, ag-grid-ng2, ag-grid-polymer, ag-grid-aurelia { d= isplay: block; } .ag-hidden { display: none !important; } .ag-invisible { visibility: hidden !important; } .ag-drag-handle { cursor: grab; } .ag-column-drop-wrapper { display: flex; } .ag-column-drop-horizontal-half-width { display: inline-block; width: 50% != important; } .ag-unselectable { user-select: none; } .ag-selectable { user-select: text; } .ag-tab { position: relative; } .ag-tab-guard { position: absolute; width: 0px; height: 0px; display: block= ; } .ag-select-agg-func-popup { position: absolute; } .ag-input-wrapper, .ag-picker-field-wrapper { display: flex; -webkit-box-fl= ex: 1; flex: 1 1 auto; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; .ag-body-viewport, .ag-rtl .ag-body-horizontal-sc= roll { -webkit-box-orient: horizontal; -webkit-box-direction: reverse; flex= -direction: row-reverse; } .ag-rtl .ag-icon-contracted, .ag-rtl .ag-icon-tree-closed { display: block;= transform: rotate(180deg); } .ag-layout-print.ag-body-viewport { -webkit-box-flex: 0; flex: 0 0 auto; } .ag-layout-print.ag-root-wrapper { display: inline-flex; } .ag-layout-print .ag-center-cols-clipper { min-width: 100%; } .ag-layout-print .ag-body-horizontal-scroll { display: none; } .ag-layout-print.ag-force-vertical-scroll { overflow-y: visible !important;= } @media print { .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-ro= ot-wrapper-body, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-root, .ag-root-wrappe= r.ag-layout-print .ag-body-viewport, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-c= enter-cols-container, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-center-cols-view= port, .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-center-cols-clipper, .ag-root-wr= apper.ag-layout-print .ag-body-horizontal-scroll-viewport, .ag-root-wrapper= .ag-layout-print .ag-virtual-list-viewport { height: auto !important; overf= low: hidden !important; display: block !important; } .ag-root-wrapper.ag-layout-print .ag-row { break-inside: avoid; } } .ag-body .ag-body-viewport { } .ag-chart { position: relative; display: flex; overflow: hidden; width: 100= %; height: 100%; } .ag-chart-components-wrapper { position: relative; display: flex; -webkit-b= ox-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 auto; overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-title-edit { position: absolute; display: none; top: 0px; left: 0= px; text-align: center; } .ag-chart-title-edit.currently-editing { display: inline-block; } .ag-chart-canvas-wrapper { position: relative; -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1= 1 auto; overflow: hidden; } .ag-charts-canvas { display: block; } .ag-chart-menu { position: absolute; top: 10px; width: 24px; overflow: hidd= en; display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: nor= mal; flex-direction: column; } .ag-ltr .ag-chart-menu { right: 20px; } .ag-rtl .ag-chart-menu { left: 20px; } .ag-chart-docked-container { position: relative; width: 0px; min-width: 0px= ; transition: min-width 0.4s; } .ag-chart-menu-hidden ~ .ag-chart-docked-container { max-width: 0px; overfl= ow: hidden; } .ag-chart-tabbed-menu { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; -webkit-b= ox-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column;= overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-tabbed-menu-header { -webkit-box-flex: 0; flex: 0 0 auto; user-se= lect: none; cursor: default; } .ag-chart-tabbed-menu-body { display: flex; -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 = auto; -webkit-box-align: stretch; align-items: stretch; overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-tab { width: 100%; overflow: hidden auto; } .ag-chart-settings { overflow-x: hidden; } .ag-chart-settings-wrapper { position: relative; -webkit-box-orient: vertic= al; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; hei= ght: 100%; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-settings-nav-bar { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; alig= n-items: center; width: 100%; height: 30px; padding: 0px 10px; user-select:= none; } .ag-chart-settings-card-selector { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center= ; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; -webkit-box-flex: 1; = flex: 1 1 auto; height: 100%; padding: 0px 10px; } .ag-chart-settings-card-item { cursor: pointer; width: 10px; height: 10px; = background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); position: relative; } .ag-chart-settings-card-item.ag-not-selected { opacity: 0.2; } .ag-chart-settings-card-item::before { content: " "; display: block; positi= on: absolute; background-color: transparent; left: 50%; top: 50%; margin-le= ft: -10px; margin-top: -10px; width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ag-chart-settings-prev, .ag-chart-settings-next { position: relative; -web= kit-box-flex: 0; flex: 0 0 auto; } .ag-chart-settings-prev-button, .ag-chart-settings-next-button { position: = absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; cursor: pointer; = opacity: 0; } .ag-chart-settings-mini-charts-container { position: relative; -webkit-box-= flex: 1; flex: 1 1 auto; overflow: hidden auto; } .ag-chart-settings-mini-wrapper { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; = display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal;= flex-direction: column; width: 100%; min-height: 100%; overflow: hidden; } .ag-chart-settings-mini-wrapper.ag-animating { transition: left 0.3s ease-i= n-out; } .ag-chart-mini-thumbnail { cursor: pointer; } .ag-chart-mini-thumbnail-canvas { display: block; } .ag-chart-data-wrapper, .ag-chart-format-wrapper { display: flex; -webkit-b= ox-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column;= position: relative; user-select: none; } { display: flex; top: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; = -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; j= ustify-content: center; } .ag-chart .ag-chart-menu { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .ag-chart-menu-hidden:hover .ag-chart-menu { opacity: 1; pointer-events: al= l; } .ag-date-time-list-page-title-bar { display: flex; } border-bottom-width: 1px; border-bottom-= style: solid; border-bottom-color: var(--ag-border-color, #bdc3c7); } .ag-theme-balham .ag-column-drop-cell { height: 24px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-column-drop-vertical-title { color: var(--ag-foregroun= d-color, #000); } .ag-theme-balham .ag-column-drop-vertical-cell { margin-left: 8px; margin-r= ight: 8px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-column-drop-vertical-cell-text { margin-left: 8px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-column-drop-vertical-icon { color: var(--ag-secondary-= foreground-color, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.54)); } .ag-theme-balham .ag-ltr .ag-column-drop-vertical-empty-message { padding-l= eft: 24px; padding-right: 4px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-rtl .ag-column-drop-vertical-empty-message { padding-r= ight: 24px; padding-left: 4px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-column-drop-horizontal { height: 32px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-column-drop-empty { color: var(--ag-disabled-foregroun= d-color, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38)); } .ag-theme-balham .ag-column-drop-horizontal-cell-text { margin-left: 8px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-column-drop-vertical { padding-top: 8px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-menu-header { background-color: var(--ag-header-backgr= ound-color, #f5f7f7); } .ag-theme-balham .ag-overlay-loading-center { background-color: var(--ag-ba= ckground-color, white); border-width: 1px; border-style: solid; border-imag= e: initial; border-color: var(--ag-border-color, #bdc3c7); color: var(--ag-= foreground-color, #000); padding: 16px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-tooltip { border: none; background-color: rgb(203, 208= , 211); } .ag-theme-balham .ag-panel-title-bar-button-icon { font-size: 20px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-chart-data-section, .ag-theme-balham .ag-chart-format-= section { padding-bottom: 2px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-group-toolbar { background-color: var(--ag-subheader-t= oolbar-background-color, rgba(226, 233, 235, 0.5)); } .ag-theme-balham .ag-chart-tab { padding-top: 2px; } .ag-theme-balham .ag-charts-format-sub-level-group-item { margin-bottom: 6p= x; } .dnd-container { max-height: 60vh; overflow: hidden auto; background: rgb(2= 31, 231, 231); } .dnd-container.selected .dnd-item label > div > span:first-child { position= : absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; bottom: 0px; width: 30px; border-right: 1p= x solid rgb(231, 231, 231); display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align= -items: center; font-weight: bold; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-conten= t: center; } .dnd-container.selected .dnd-item label > div > span:nth-child(2) { padding= -left: 34px; } .dnd-container.selected .dnd-item label > div:nth-child(2) > span:nth-child= (2) { padding-left: unset; } .dnd-container .dnd-item { margin: 0px -1px; padding-left: 5px; padding-rig= ht: 5px; } .dnd-container .dnd-item label { width: 100%; font-weight: normal; display:= flex; -webkit-box-orient: horizontal; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-= direction: row; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; margin: 0px= ; } .dnd-container .dnd-item label > div { -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; d= isplay: flex; } .dnd-container .dnd-item label .action-delete { padding-left: 30px; text-al= ign: left; cursor: pointer; } .dnd-container .dnd-item label .action-delete svg { margin: 0px 3px; } .AZ-Dnd { -webkit-box-orient: horizontal; -webkit-box-direction: normal; fl= ex-direction: row; padding-left: 5px; padding-right: 5px; } .AZ-Dnd > div { width: calc(50% - 24px); } .AZ-Dnd > div > .card { height: 400px; overflow-y: auto; } .AZ-Dnd > div > .card > .dnd-container { max-height: 100%; min-width: 200px= ; } .AZ-Dnd > div > .card > .dnd-container .list-group-item { padding: 5px; } .AZ-Dnd > .AZ-Dnd-Action { width: 48px; display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: = vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; padding: 5= px; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; } .AZ-Dnd > .AZ-Dnd-Action > button { min-width: 36px; margin-top: 5px; margi= n-bottom: 5px; } .AZ-Dnd .Search-input { position: relative; } .AZ-Export-Settings .ag-status-bar { display: none; } .formula .item-formula { margin-top: 10px; } .formula .item-formula > span, .formula .item-formula > div { color: red; } .formula a { color: rgb(0, 64, 133) !important; } .formula.az-app.MuiDialog-root .MuiPaper-root { overflow: visible; } .react-autocomplete-input { overflow: auto; max-height: 200px; } .az-export-header #export-tooltip-icon-move, .az-export-header #export-tool= tip-icon-close { margin-left: 10px; cursor: pointer; margin-right: 10px; wh= ite-space: nowrap !important; } .az-export-header { padding: 5px; -webkit-box-pack: end; justify-content: f= lex-end; display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; hei= ght: 32px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); border-bottom: 1px solid = rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.125); } .az-export-container { padding: 32px; } .react-autocomplete-input { background-clip: padding-box; background-color:= rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); bottom: auto; b= ox-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.176) 0px 6px 12px; display: block; font-size: 14= px; list-style: none; padding: 1px; position: absolute; text-align: left; z= -index: 20000; } .react-autocomplete-input > li { cursor: pointer; padding: 10px; min-width:= 100px; } .react-autocomplete-input > li.active { background-color: rgb(51, 122, 183)= ; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .custom-popover-container { width: 400px; border-radius: 8px; border: 3px s= olid rgb(236, 247, 235); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); overflow: hi= dden; } .custom-popover-container .header { padding: 24px; background-color: rgb(23= 6, 247, 235); font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; display: flex; -webkit-bo= x-align: center; align-items: center; } .custom-popover-container .header > div:last-child { margin-left: 6px; } .custom-popover-container .header.can-sell-new { color: rgb(64, 170, 58); } .custom-popover-container .header.can-sell-partially { background-color: rg= b(208, 234, 255); color: rgb(0, 110, 197); } .custom-popover-container .header.restricted { background-color: rgb(255, 2= 12, 212); color: rgb(166, 69, 69); } .custom-popover-container:has(.can-sell-partially) { border: 3px solid rgb(= 208, 234, 255); } .custom-popover-container:has(.restricted) { border: 3px solid rgb(255, 212= , 212); } .custom-popover-container .item { padding: 6px 16px; border-bottom: 1px sol= id rgb(236, 247, 235); font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px; } .custom-popover-container .item.item-need-approval { display: flex; color: = rgb(166, 69, 69); -webkit-box-pack: justify; justify-content: space-between= ; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; } .custom-popover-container .item.item-need-approval img { margin-right: 4px;= } .custom-popover-container .item.item-need-approval .approval-required-text = { color: rgb(85, 85, 85); font-size: 10px; } .custom-popover-container .item.item-can-sell { display: flex; -webkit-box-= align: center; align-items: center; color: rgb(64, 170, 58); } .custom-popover-container .item.item-can-sell img { margin-right: 4px; } .custom-popover-container .item.item-cannot-list { display: flex; -webkit-b= ox-align: center; align-items: center; color: rgb(102, 102, 102); } .custom-popover-container .item.item-cannot-list img { margin-right: 4px; }
